QA-001.name: non_empty_output
QA-001.description: Output must not be empty or whitespace-only

QA-002.name: no_placeholder_text
QA-002.description: Output must not contain placeholder text like [INSERT], TODO, PLACEHOLDER, <FILL_IN>

QA-003.name: minimum_length
QA-003.description: Output must meet minimum character length thresholds per task type

QA-004.name: no_banned_phrases
QA-004.description: Output must not contain phrases from the client's banned phrases list or global banned list

QA-005.name: schema_compliance
QA-005.description: Output must match the declared JSON schema for its task type

QA-006.name: professional_tone
QA-006.description: Output must maintain professional, non-offensive language

QA-007.name: factual_claims_flagged
QA-007.description: Outputs with factual claims about specific companies, people, or statistics must be flagged for human review

QA-008.name: minimum_confidence_score
QA-008.description: QA confidence score must be >= 0.70 to pass; >= 0.50 for retry; < 0.50 is hard fail

QA-009.name: personalization_present
QA-009.description: Sales outreach must include company-specific personalization (company name, role, context)

QA-010.name: cta_present
QA-010.description: Outreach and marketing content must include a clear call-to-action

QA-011.name: structured_data_parseable
QA-011.description: Data entry, doc extract, and CRM outputs must be valid parseable JSON

QA-012.name: no_pii_in_output
QA-012.description: Outputs must not expose PII that was not present in the input (no hallucinated emails, phone numbers, SSNs)
